// Utilizamos la variable de entorno, si no existe usamos un fallback local
const API_URL=`${process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:8080"}/tasks`;export const getTasks=async authorId=>{const response=await fetch(`${API_URL}?authorId=${authorId}`);if(!response.ok)throw new Error("Error al cargar tareas");return await response.json();};export const createTask=async(taskData,authorId)=>{const response=await fetch(`${API_URL}?authorId=${authorId}`,{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify(taskData)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error("Error al crear la tarea");return await response.json();};export const deleteTask=async taskId=>{await fetch(`${API_URL}/${taskId}`,{method:"DELETE"});};
